title: Don't Hurt Others' Pets
description: Prevents people from hurting pets that don't belong to them
body:
With this mod installed on the **server**, players won't be able to attack pets that don't belong to them.

With this mod installed on the **client**, you won't be able to attack pets that don't belong to you.

Installing this mod on both the server and the client is redundant but won't cause any issues!

List of entities this mod works for:
- Cat
- Fox
- Parrot
- Wolf
